positive: An intricate, stylized mural featuring a majestic cosmic phoenix rising from swirling nebulas and vibrant space dust. The phoenix should have sharp, geometric feathers with tones of deep sapphire, fiery orange, and electric cyan. It is surrounded by bioluminescent flora and stylized constellations rendered as delicate gold line art. The composition is highly symmetrical and centralized, emphasizing strong, clean silhouettes against a deep, dramatic midnight blue background. Flat graphic illustration style meets detailed psychedelic linework, perfect for a high-contrast, repeating textile pattern. Studio lighting, clean edges, pop art aesthetic, highly detailed, vaporwave colors.
negative: blurry, low quality, noisy, grainy, text, watermark, signature, logo, trademark, extra limbs, bad anatomy, distorted, low contrast, photorealism, messy, realistic photo
